name: 3pk Wave Half Medium Decorative Basket Gray - Brightroom™
description:
Store a wide variety of items in convenient style with this 3-Pack of Wave Half Medium Baskets from Brightroom™. Made from polypropylene material, these three wave medium baskets have a rectangular shape that makes them ideal for storing throw blankets, pillows, toys and more. The open tops allow you to quickly and easily see what's inside, and cutout side handles allow for easy transport from room to room.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
